objective: Promote Lily Roo releases, keep lilyroo.com/admin status and metrics current, and drive YouTube monetization progress.

monetization.source: youtube live metrics, with metrics history fallback

runway.action_needed: Increase weekly subscriber acquisition before the channel can reach 1,000 subscribers within a year.

next_pressure: 1 approved unpublished posts are past their scheduled time; repair executor/platform blockers or reschedule them.
3 executor records are blocked by approval.
1 executor records need platform repair before they can publish.
Increase weekly subscriber acquisition before the channel can reach 1,000 subscribers within a year.

public_metric_capture_backlog.guardrail: Do not treat private analytics fields as public-capture candidates.

kpi.pending_manual_update_command: python3 scripts/update_manual_social_stats.py tiktok.profile_views_7d=VALUE instagram.profile_visits_7d=VALUE x.impressions_7d=VALUE facebook.reach_7d=VALUE spotify.release_streams=VALUE spotify.saves=VALUE --refresh-admin

manual_metric_collection_steps.reason: (#100) The value must be a valid insights metric
Instagram posting could not resolve instagram_business_account from FB_PAGE_ID; set IG_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID or reconnect the Instagram Business/Creator account to the Facebook Page
Spotify streams, saves, monthly listeners, and artist followers require Spotify for Artists export or a connected analytics source.
TikTok metrics need TikTok OAuth credentials.
X metrics need X_USER_ACCESS_TOKEN with user lookup access.

rows.evidence_hint: Use the last-7-days reach value from Meta insights.
rows.import_effect: update data/manual_social_stats.json facebook.reach_7d from 'pending' to the filled new_value

rows.evidence_hint: Use the last-7-days profile visits value from the professional dashboard.
rows.import_effect: update data/manual_social_stats.json instagram.profile_visits_7d from 'pending' to the filled new_value

rows.evidence_hint: Use lifetime streams for the promoted release from Spotify for Artists.
rows.import_effect: update data/manual_social_stats.json spotify.release_streams from 'pending' to the filled new_value

rows.evidence_hint: Use lifetime saves for the promoted release from Spotify for Artists.
rows.import_effect: update data/manual_social_stats.json spotify.saves from 'pending' to the filled new_value

rows.source_hint: TikTok Studio or Creator Center analytics
rows.evidence_hint: Use the last-7-days profile views value from TikTok analytics.
rows.import_effect: update data/manual_social_stats.json tiktok.profile_views_7d from 'pending' to the filled new_value

rows.source_hint: X Analytics or account profile metrics
rows.evidence_hint: Use the last-7-days impressions value from X analytics.
rows.import_effect: update data/manual_social_stats.json x.impressions_7d from 'pending' to the filled new_value

manual_metric_import_manifest.guardrail: Import only filled nonnegative numeric new_value cells; leave unknown rows blank.
